variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 108 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SAP075G1L10AP01
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 108 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SAP075G1L10AP01. Easy to install and replace, the FS 108 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
